summary: Pre-deployment comprehensive testing of Wasteland Zero roguelite RPG. All critical systems verified working: character creation (4 steps), map navigation (tile-click and keyboard), combat (ATK, POWER D20, VATS, FLEE), REST button (D-PAD removed), dice modal (120px, overflow:visible), town features, inventory, skills, save/load (3 slots), and premium store.
passed_tests: D-PAD REMOVED: Confirmed D-PAD is removed from game.html, replaced with REST & HEAL button only
DICE MODAL: Verified 120x120px dice face with overflow:visible - dice animation NOT cut off
CHARACTER CREATION: All 4 steps working - Race selection (5 races), Archetype selection (4 classes), Traits selection (7 traits), Deploy
MAP NAVIGATION: Tile-click and keyboard (WASD/arrows) navigation working
COMBAT SYSTEM: ATK, POWER (D20), BRACE, VATS targeting, FLEE, ITEM buttons all functional
V.A.T.S. TARGETING: Shows HEAD, TORSO, ARMS, LEGS with DC, hit chance, damage info
D20 ROLL SYSTEM: Power attack shows roll + modifier = total vs DC, SUCCESS/FAILURE display
REST BUTTON: MAKE CAMP modal - costs 20 caps, +41 HP, -10 RAD, 30% ambush chance
TOWN FEATURES: MEDIC, SHOP, ARTIFICER, BOUNTIES, LEAVE buttons visible
INVENTORY TAB: Equipment slots (weapon, armor, accessories), BAG with rarity filters
SKILLS TAB: Skill tree with class progression (WARRIOR -> WARLORD/GUARDIAN at LV10)
SAVE/LOAD SYSTEM: 3 slots working - SAVE & QUIT TO MENU, CONTINUE, NEW, DELETE
PREMIUM STORE: Categories (Premium, Cosmetics, Boosts, Extras) with Stripe integration
LOOT SYSTEM: COLLECT ALL, MANAGE BAG, SELL JUNK, SALVAGE UNLOCKED, LEAVE
ACHIEVEMENTS: 'FIRST BLOOD' achievement triggered on first combat win
XP CURVE: Verified slower curve (300 + lv×80) in main.js line 4997
AUDIO SYSTEM: Sound effects toggles visible in settings (ON/OFF)
HIDEOUT ENCOUNTERS: REST HERE (+HP, loot supply cache) or MOVE ON options
seed_data_creation: None - tested with fresh game starts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pre-deployment testing complete. All core systems verified: character creation, combat, map navigation, D20 dice rolls, town features, inventory, skills, save/load, premium store. D-PAD successfully removed, REST button working. Dice modal 120px with overflow:visible - no cutoff issues. XP curve slowed to 300 + lv×80. Game ready for deployment.

d_pad_removal.details: D-PAD removed, replaced with REST & HEAL (20💰) button only

dice_modal_fix.details: Dice face 120x120px with overflow:visible - animation not cut off

xp_curve_slowdown.details: XP curve changed to 300 + lv×80 (was 200 + lv×50)

store_integration.details: Premium store with Stripe integration, boost modifiers working
